zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Multon於大約1195年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Thomas de Multon II31歲，母親Sarah de Flete22歲。他於1221年與Alice de Lucy結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1256年在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan de Multon于大约1195年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Multon II31岁，母亲Sarah de Flete22岁。他于1221年与Alice de Lucy结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1256年在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Multon was born about 1195, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas de Multon II, was 31 and his mother, Sarah de Flete, was 22. He married Alice de Lucy in 1221. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1256, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Multon est né environ 1195, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Multon II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Flete, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Lucy en 1221. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1256, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Multon um 1195 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Multon II 31 und seine Mutter Sarah de Flete 22. Er hat 1221 Alice de Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1256 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Multon è nato il circa 1195 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Multon II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sarah de Flete, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Lucy nel 1221. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1256, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Multonが約1195年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Multon IIは31歳，母Sarah de Fleteは22歳であった。1221年にAlice de Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1256年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Multon(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Multon II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Flete(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1221년 Alice de Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1256년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1195–about 1256: tany ho any amin'ny 1195–tany ho any amin'ny 1256

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Multon nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Multon II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Flete, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Lucy em 1221. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1256, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Multon родился около 1195 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Multon II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Flete, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Lucy в 1221 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1256 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.about 1195–about 1256: e tusa o le 1195–e tusa o le 1256

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan de Multon nació aproximadamente 1195, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Multon II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sarah de Flete, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice de Lucy en 1221. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1256, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
